---
title: "Animated_Flow_Twitter_Map"
author: "Ben Vales"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
#loading packages
library(mapdeck)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(h3r)
library(h3jsr)
library(readr)
library(sf)
library(scales)
library(usethis)
library(htmlwidgets)
```

```{r}


#load files needed to create map (from base map)
# nodes: one row per H3 hexagonal cell, with cell name + centroid lat/lon
# edges: directed flow counts between pairs of H3 cells (from → to)
nodes <- read_csv("../../data/derived_data/nodes_and_edge_data/nyc_nodes.csv")
edges <- read_csv("../../data/derived_data/nodes_and_edge_data/nyc_edges.csv")

```



```{r}
#Joins node coordinates onto the edge table so each edge row carries both its origin and destination lat/lon — the format mapdeck expects for arcs.
edges <- edges %>%
  select(from, to, count) %>%   #Drop unused columns; retain only the origin 
                                #cell, destination cell,and the flow count between them.
  left_join(nodes,by = c("from" = "cell_name")) %>% 
  #Left-join nodes on the origin cell ("from") to attach origin coords.
  rename(from_lat = lat, from_lon = lon) %>% #rename coulums to from_lat/from_long

  left_join(nodes, by = c("to" = "cell_name")) %>%
  rename(to_lat = lat, to_lon = lon) #Left-join nodes again on the destination cell ("to") for destination coords.
```


```{r}
#mapdeck (no filtering)
#calls map deck for base map
nyc_arc <-mapdeck( 
  token = Sys.getenv("MAPBOX_TOKEN"), #loads API mapbox token
  style = mapdeck_style('dark'), #chooses dark style
  pitch = 45 #pitch of map
) %>% 
  #creates the arcs
  add_animated_arc(
    data = edges, #loads data
    origin = c("from_lon", "from_lat"), # [longitude, latitude] of arc start
    destination = c("to_lon", "to_lat"), # [longitude, latitude] of arc end
     stroke_from = "#00FFCC", #sets orgin color as teal
    stroke_to = "#FF00FF", #sets destination color as pink
    stroke_from_opacity = 255, #sets stroke opacity from 0 (thick) to 255 (very thin)
    stroke_to_opacity = 255, #sets stroke opacity to 255 (very thin)
  )


```

```{r}
#heat map

# Aggregate total inbound flow per destination cell
node_heat <- edges %>%
  group_by(to) %>%                              #group by destination cell 
  summarise(total_count = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # sum all incoming flow counts per cell;
# na.rm = TRUE ignores missing values
  
# attach lat/lon from nodes table so each destination cell has coordinates for mapping
  left_join(nodes, by = c("to" = "cell_name"))      

# Build heatmap
nyc_heatmap <- mapdeck(
  token = Sys.getenv("MAPBOX_TOKEN"),                    #Loads Mapbox API token from .Renviron
  style = mapdeck_style('dark'),                         #dark basemap style
  pitch = 0                                              #flat (top-down) view
) %>%
  add_heatmap(
    data = node_heat,             #inbound aggregated data
    lat = "lat",                 #latitude column from nodes
    lon = "lon",                #longitude column from nodes
    weight = "total_count",        # ntensity driven by total data
    radius_pixels = 60,                  #how far each point "bleeds" — larger = smoother
    intensity = 1,                  #global multiplier on all weight values
    threshold = 0.05                #hides points below 5% of max weight (removes noise)
  )
```

```{r}
#Arc-Map (filtered to highlight highest concentrations of movements)

#Filter Logic (only top 10% of areas with highest travel data get flagged)
edges_filtered <- edges %>% filter(count > quantile(count, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)) 
#plotting
nyc_arc_filtered <- mapdeck(
  token = Sys.getenv("MAPBOX_TOKEN"), #loads mapbox token
  style = 'mapbox://styles/mapbox/dark-v9', #chooses style
  pitch = 45, #sets the angle for map viewing
) %>%
  add_animated_arc(
    data = edges_filtered,  #loads filtered data
    origin = c("from_lon", "from_lat"), #starting coordinates (their "home")
    destination = c("to_lon", "to_lat"), #end-point coordinates (where they are traveling too)
    stroke_width = 1.5, #sets stroke width
    stroke_from = "#00FFCC", #sets origin point color to teal
    stroke_to = "#FF00FF",   #sets destination color to pink
    stroke_from_opacity = 120, #Controls transparency of stroke_from
    stroke_to_opacity = 120, #Controls transparency of stroke_to
    trail_length = 0.5,#The proportion of the arc that is lit up at any one time (0 to 1)
    animation_speed = 0.2
    )
nyc_arc_filtered
```

```{r}
#save outputs
saveWidget(nyc_arc, "nyc_arc.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
saveWidget(nyc_heatmap, "nyc_heatmap.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
saveWidget(nyc_arc_filtered, "nyc_arc_filtered.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

```
